figures.caption: Figure 1: Kinematic structure and initial configuration of the five-finger robotic hand considered in this study
Figure 2: Kinematic structure of the hand (a) Joint configuration of a human hand, (b) Key parameters of the simplified structure

Figure 3: Distribution of workspace volume, manipulability, and sensitivity for each design satisfying the optimization constraints, along with the corresponding objective function values under different weighting coefficients: (a) Case 1 - w1 = w2 = w3 = 0.33, (b) Case 2 - w1 = 0.8, w2 = w3 = 0.1
Figure 4: Workspace and overlap workspace corresponding to the designs with the highest objective function values: (a) Case 1, (b) Case 2
Figure 5: Distribution of objective function values for each design under seven different weighting coefficient configurations, along with four representative optimized results (A, B, C, and D)
Figure 6: Phalanx length ratios of the thumb and fingers for the four optimized design groups (A, B, C, and D)
